pages.title: Custom Traders
pages.text: Invulnerable villagers placed around the world. They sell mod content that has been pulled from normal crafting.$(br2)They are the cross-class shortcut. If your class can't craft a Mage robe, the Wizard sells it for $(l:traders/runes)runes$(/l).

pages.title: How trades work
pages.text: $(li)Trades never run out.$(li)Trades never go on sale — no reputation or demand discount.$(li)Within a trader, trades sort cheapest to most expensive by total rune-cost.$(li)Each trader caps at 35 trades; bigger themes split into a second trader.$(br2)Each trader has one tight theme — Wizard sells Wizards gear, Bishop sells holy plate, Engineer sells aircraft parts. Find a trader village; learn its specialty.
